name: Anden Mayne
description_en: Anden Mayne is the main dragonology expert, tasked at researching the physiology of dragons. He is a member of Demacian Society of Naturalists.
description_fr: Anden Mayne est le principal expert en dragonologie, chargé de rechercher la physiologie des dragons. Il est membre de la Société Demacienne des Naturalistes.
